summary: Implemented a governed artifact retention policy draft plus the specbridge-artifact-retention-policy read-only evaluator. The policy remains draft-only with enforcement=none and cleanup_permission=none. The evaluator classifies artifact inventory families, records future cleanup gates, writes only the governed artifact retention policy evaluation artifact when explicitly requested, and performs no artifact deletion, movement, compression, pruning, archival, upload, remote mutation, cleanup apply mode, or retention enforcement.
validations: GitHub Actions SpecBridge Review Gate: passed
GitHub Actions SpecBridge PR Review Report: passed
GitHub Actions Claude Review Non Blocking: passed
policy_result: Within policy. All changed files are inside the issue-218 exclusive_write scope. No protected files, secrets, production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, database, dependency, deployment, workflow, CI/CD security, operator decision registry, issue #194, or digital twin changes are included.
risk_result: Within bounds. The command is read-only when -OutputPath is omitted, reads local artifact inventory only, performs no network calls, and the only allowed write path is the governed artifact retention policy evaluation artifact. The feature explicitly performs no artifact deletion, movement, compression, pruning, archival implementation, upload, remote mutation, cleanup apply mode, or retention enforcement.
unresolved_risks: Actual artifact cleanup or retention enforcement remains blocked until a future dedicated policy and execution contract authorize it.
merge_status: PR #219 merged with squash commit 835bb51b20a0a7628db61eeac542d3725c7b2b88 after local validation and GitHub checks passed.
